---
name: Rule or skill proposal
description: Propose a new or improved rule, skill, agent, or workflow.
title: "proposal: "
labels: ["proposal", "rules-skills"]
---

## Proposal type

- [ ] Rule
- [ ] Skill
- [ ] Agent
- [ ] Workflow
- [ ] Template
- [ ] Documentation

## Problem this prevents

Describe the agent mistake or desktop architecture issue.

## Proposed guidance

Describe the desired rule, skill, or workflow.

## Desktop relevance

Explain how this applies to WinUI/WPF, MVVM, MVI-style state flow, Clean Architecture, or Roslyn MCP.

## Public-safety check

- [ ] This proposal uses generic examples only.
- [ ] No tenant IDs, secrets, private URLs, company names, internal project names, or personal data are included.
